item.title: AI in the Quality Department: A Practical Path Forward for Small Manufacturers
item.description: A practical guide for small manufacturers adopting AI-driven quality inspection and defect detection solutions.

item.title: GigaVis Wins 7.2 Billion-Won Inspection Equipment Order From Chinese Substrate Maker
item.description: GigaVis secures a significant 7.2 billion-won contract for inspection equipment, underscoring strong commercial demand for AOI systems.

item.title: Agentic AI is scaling in manufacturing, but infrastructure gaps remain
item.description: Agentic AI is seeing broader adoption in industrial manufacturing, highlighting potential market shifts in automated operations.

item.title: U.S. Robot Industry Returns to Double Digit Growth
item.description: The US robotics market reports double-digit growth, reflecting increased factory automation investments.

item.title: Nearfield Raises $380M to Advance AI-Era Semiconductor Metrology
item.description: Nearfield has raised $380 million to advance its semiconductor metrology systems for AI hardware production.

item.title: ZEISS PiWeb Updates Help Manufacturers Reduce Quality Silos and Scale with Confidence
item.description: ZEISS PiWeb software updates aim to help manufacturers scale precision metrology data across the enterprise.

item.title: Accenture Strengthen Software and Automation Capabilities with Acquisition of Industries eXcellence Group
item.description: Accenture's acquisition highlights a major market consolidation trend to bolster industrial automation and manufacturing software solutions.
